hero.description: Premium mushroom-based actives designed for cosmetic formulations. Cosmetic-grade extracts, consistent sourcing, and B2B-ready documentation.
hero.footer: B2B supply • Samples available • Custom development on request
hero.deliverText: A focused line of biotech-inspired actives: mushroom extracts and fermentation-derived ingredients, presented with a premium identity and formulation-friendly positioning.
features: TDS / COA / SDS-ready structure for B2B.

project.title: Project
project.subtitle: A clean B2B-facing overview of your lab process and production tracking. Built for credibility and scale.
project.leftText: MUSHEAS combines disciplined extraction and fermentation workflows with consistent presentation for cosmetic manufacturers. This website mockup highlights a premium identity: teal + gold, minimal layout, and clear B2B sections.

ticks.title: Batch logic
ticks.desc: Traceable batches, QC checkpoints, and consistent deliverables.

ticks.title: B2B-ready
ticks.desc: Clean product pages, request workflow, and documentation-first messaging.

ticks.title: Brand system
ticks.desc: A unified product line look: extracts + ferments under one premium identity.

project.rightText: Add your real lab photos, COA/TDS downloads, and inquiry forms. This layout is designed to convert manufacturer meetings into sample requests.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Send a request for samples, pricing, or technical documentation. We’ll reply quickly.
